problem_text_cn: 1. 用力学方法求解光滑曲线的曲率半径：（a）双曲线方程x²/A²−y²/B²=1，求顶点处曲率半径ρ；（b）旋转半径r、螺距h的等距螺旋线，求曲率半径ρ。2. 验证圆柱面拉普拉斯公式的数学前提：设计两对通过Q点的正交正截面，证明截线曲率半径倒数之和相同。
problem_text_en: 1. Solve the radius of curvature of smooth curves using mechanical methods: (a) Hyperbola equation x²/A²−y²/B²=1, find the radius of curvature ρ at the vertex；(b) Equiangular helix with rotation radius r and pitch h, find the radius of curvature ρ. 2. Verify the mathematical premise of Laplace's formula for cylindrical surfaces: design two pairs of orthogonal normal sections passing through point Q, and prove that the sum of the reciprocals of the radii of curvature of the section lines is the same.
problem_solution_cn: （1）曲率半径求解：- （a）双曲线顶点：小行星轨道能量守恒+角动量守恒，引力提供向心力，解得ρ=B²/A；- （b）等距螺旋线：运动分解为匀速圆周（v_r）和匀速直线（v_h），向心加速度a=v_r²/r，合速度v=√(v_r²+v_h²)，曲率半径ρ=v²/a=r√(1+(2πr/h)²)。（2）圆柱面验证：- 第一对截面：S₁（垂直母线，截线圆ρ₁=r）、S₂（含母线，截线直线ρ₂→∞），1/ρ₁+1/ρ₂=1/r；- 第二对斜交截面：S₁'、S₂'（截线椭圆），椭圆顶点曲率半径ρ₁'=r/cos²φ、ρ₂'=r/sin²φ，1/ρ₁'+1/ρ₂'=1/r，验证成立。
problem_solution_en: （1）Solution of radius of curvature：- (a) Hyperbola vertex: Asteroid orbit energy conservation + angular momentum conservation, gravity provides centripetal force, solving gives ρ=B²/A；- (b) Equiangular helix: Decompose motion into uniform circular (v_r) and uniform linear (v_h), centripetal acceleration a=v_r²/r, resultant velocity v=√(v_r²+v_h²), radius of curvature ρ=v²/a=r√(1+(2πr/h)²)。（2）Verification on cylindrical surface：- First pair of sections: S₁（perpendicular to generatrix, section circle ρ₁=r）、S₂（containing generatrix, section line ρ₂→∞），1/ρ₁+1/ρ₂=1/r；- Second pair of oblique sections: S₁'、S₂'（section ellipses），radius of curvature at ellipse vertices ρ₁'=r/cos²φ、ρ₂'=r/sin²φ，1/ρ₁'+1/ρ₂'=1/r，verification holds。
